word: G3369 - μηδέπω - mēdépō - may-dep'-o - Not yet

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μηδέπω

- Transliteration: medepo

- Phonetic: may-dep'-o

- Definition:

1. not yet

- Origin: from G3366 and G4452

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: From G3366 and G4452; not even yet: - not yet.
